policy: Do not relabel a save_last_frame scene as a video success. Preserve the original result, then revise the next registry version with an exact pinned animated scene.

recommendations.coverage_tradeoff: Keeps Axes, a filled area polygon, ValueTracker, updater, and curve geometry; it replaces bounded-area and Riemann-rectangle coverage with an animated constant-area rectangle.

Keeps an upstream-exact animated ThreeDScene and camera-motion challenge, but loses Surface and Gaussian geometry coverage. Preserve the original ThreeDSurfacePlot as a static poster fixture if Surface coverage is still needed.

rejected_alternative.name: ThreeDSurfacePlotAnimated
rejected_alternative.reason: Adding ambient camera rotation to ThreeDSurfacePlot would preserve Surface coverage, but it would be project-authored derived code rather than an exact human/source condition. It may be a separate derived stress test, not a replacement in the source-exact backtranslation condition.
